entries.message: GitHub PAT detected in command payload.
GitLab PAT detected in command payload.
Slack token detected in command payload.
AWS access key detected in command payload.
entries.notes: Includes ASIA temp credentials. AWS canned example keys (e.g. AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE) will match — accepted FP.

entries.message: OpenAI API key detected in command payload.
entries.notes: Bare sk- branch is alphanumeric only; sk-proj- allows _- per published format.

entries.message: Anthropic API key detected in command payload.
Stripe key detected in command payload.
Google API key detected in command payload.
Authorization header detected — credential payload inside command.
entries.notes: Target is raw because the header value lives inside a quoted string that strip blanks.

entries.message: Credential-shaped env var reference detected.
entries.notes: target=raw is intentional: `echo "$GH_TOKEN"` is the most common exfil shape and the var ref lives inside a double-quoted string that strip would blank. Tradeoff: literal `$VAR_NAME` mentions inside single-quoted strings (e.g. echo 'use $GH_TOKEN in CI') will FP-block; accepted per the credential-exfil hook's stated FP stance.

entries.message: .env file path referenced.
entries.notes: Hook must additionally allowlist .example/.template suffixes — registry signals shape only.

entries.message: SSH private key path referenced.
SSH config path referenced.
AWS credentials/config file referenced.
kubeconfig path referenced.
GitHub CLI hosts.yml referenced.
Docker registry auth config referenced.
.npmrc may expose npm authentication tokens.
.pypirc may expose PyPI authentication tokens.
gem credentials file may expose RubyGems API keys.
GPG directory may expose private keys and trust data.
.git/config may embed credentials in remote URLs.
entries.notes: Hook must additionally check for embedded user:pass@ in remote URLs — registry signals shape only.

entries.message: Claude Code settings file (.claude/settings.json or .claude/settings.local.json) referenced.
entries.notes: target=raw is intentional: interpreter-body writes (python -c, bash -c, sh -c, python heredoc) place the path inside quoted/heredoc content that _strip_inert_content blanks. Verb-shaped writes are caught by inline strip-based rules in block-config-edits.sh; this entry covers the interpreter-body surface.
